page: Microsoft Azure E128-32as_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Easv7 family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor using the x86_64 architecture, delivering 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 16 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The CPU operates at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz and features 32 MB of L3 cache. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, translating to a high memory density of 32.0 GB per vCPU. The server does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

In benchmark testing, the E128-32as_v7 demonstrates top-tier single-core performance, scoring in the top 10% for stress-ng single-core CPU tests and single-threaded gzip compression. Multi-core performance is moderate, with stress-ng multi-core and PassMark database operations falling into the average range. Memory performance is strong, with PassMark memory scores in the top 25%, though uncached large-block read and write memory bandwidth remains average. For language model workloads, the server achieves top-tier text generation speeds for small 135M models, but performance drops significantly to the bottom 10% when executing text generation on large 70B models.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio, this server offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require massive memory footprints without demanding proportional scaling of compute cores. It is highly suitable for memory-intensive applications such as large-scale in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound data processing pipelines. However, the lack of local storage and GPUs makes it less suitable for high-throughput local disk I/O or hardware-accelerated machine learning training.
description: The Microsoft Azure E128-32as_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Easv7 family, featuring an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 32 dedicated vCPUs (16 physical cores) running at 4.5 GHz. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 32.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core CPU and compression performance, alongside strong memory scores, though multi-core compute and large-block memory bandwidth are average. This server is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and large-scale data processing that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128-32as_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and top-tier single-core performance, ideal for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high memory density and strong single-core performance for demanding in-memory enterprise workloads.

Equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, offering a high 32.0 GB per vCPU allocation.

Best suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and memory-bound enterprise applications.
